message: ci: unblock host builds and wasm automation

files.patch:
@@ -22,12 +22,15 @@ jobs:
           - os: ubuntu-24.04
             run_fmt: true
             run_clippy: true
+            cargo_target: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
           - os: macos-14
             run_fmt: false
             run_clippy: false
+            cargo_target: aarch64-apple-darwin
           - os: windows-2022
             run_fmt: false
             run_clippy: false
+            cargo_target: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
 
     steps:
       - name: Checkout
@@ -41,17 +44,27 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Cache cargo artifacts
         uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+        with:
+          shared-key: checks-${{ matrix.os }}-${{ matrix.cargo_target }}
+        env:
+          CARGO_BUILD_TARGET: ${{ matrix.cargo_target }}
 
       - name: Format check
         if: ${{ matrix.run_fmt }}
         run: cargo fmt --all --check
+        env:
+          CARGO_BUILD_TARGET: ${{ matrix.cargo_target }}
 
       - name: Clippy
         if: ${{ matrix.run_clippy }}
         run: cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
+        env:
+          CARGO_BUILD_TARGET: ${{ matrix.cargo_target }}
 
       - name: Tests
         run: cargo test --workspace
+        env:
+          CARGO_BUILD_TARGET: ${{ matrix.cargo_target }}
 
   wasm:
     name: Wasm (ubuntu)
@@ -84,7 +97,12 @@ jobs:
       - name: Resolve Chromium path
         id: chromium
         run: |
-          echo "path=$(node -e \"const { chromium } = require('playwright'); process.stdout.write(chromium.executablePath());\")" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          CHROMIUM_PATH=$(node - <<'NODE'
+          const { chromium } = require('playwright');
+          process.stdout.write(chromium.executablePath());
+          NODE
+          )
+          echo "path=${CHROMIUM_PATH}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
 
       - name: wasm-pack build (web target)
         run: wasm-pack build crates/scriptbots-web --target web --out-dir crates/scriptbots-web/web/pkg

@@ -24,15 +24,18 @@ jobs:
             target: linux
             dist-args: "--target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu"
             extra-targets: ""
+            build_target: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
           - os: macos-14
             target: mac-universal
             dist-args: "--target aarch64-apple-darwin --target x86_64-apple-darwin"
             extra-targets: "x86_64-apple-darwin"
             apple: true
+            build_target: aarch64-apple-darwin
           - os: windows-2022
             target: windows
             dist-args: "--target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc"
             extra-targets: ""
+            build_target: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
     runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
     steps:
       - name: Determine release tag
@@ -65,6 +68,10 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Cache cargo artifacts
         uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+        with:
+          shared-key: release-${{ matrix.target }}-${{ matrix.build_target }}
+        env:
+          CARGO_BUILD_TARGET: ${{ matrix.build_target }}
 
       - name: Install cargo-dist
         uses: taiki-e/install-action@v2
@@ -73,10 +80,14 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Generate dist manifest
         run: cargo dist manifest --tag "${{ steps.release.outputs.tag }}" --ci github
+        env:
+          CARGO_BUILD_TARGET: ${{ matrix.build_target }}
 
       - name: Build release artifacts
         shell: bash
         run: cargo dist build ${{ matrix.dist-args }} --artifacts archive --tag "${{ steps.release.outputs.tag }}" --out dist
+        env:
+          CARGO_BUILD_TARGET: ${{ matrix.build_target }}
 
       - name: Codesign macOS artifacts
         if: ${{ matrix.apple }}
